news.t: Motley Fool Asset Management Launches Three New Passive ETFs to Expand Core Portfolio Investment Offerings

holdings.infoBox: MFVL is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are CVS Health stock at 6.86%, The Walt Disney Company at 5.02%, Bristol-Myers Squibb Company at 4.77%, Exxon Mobil at 4.28%, and T-Mobile US at 4.27%.

overview.description: The Motley Fool Value Factor ETF (MFVL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Motley Fool Value index. The fund tracks a proprietary rule-based index that aims to invest in the most US value-tilted companies recommended by The Motley Fool, LLC. Stocks are selected and weighted using conviction and value composite scores MFVL was launched on Dec 8, 2025 and is issued by The Motley Fool.

data.title: Motley Fool Asset Management Launches Three New Passive ETFs to Expand Core Portfolio Investment Offerings
data.text: ALEXANDRIA, Va., Dec. 09, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Motley Fool Asset Management (“MFAM”) announced today the launch of three new exchange-traded funds (ETFs) designed to bring The Motley Fool, LLC's (...
